name: @medicine-wheel/app
description: Medicine Wheel — Interactive visual layer for Indigenous relational research with Four Directions, ceremonies, and narrative arcs

scripts.build:packages: npm run build -w src/ontology-core && npm run build --workspaces --if-present
scripts.version:patch: node scripts/bump-versions.mjs patch && node scripts/sync-versions.mjs && shx rm -rf node_modules src/*/node_modules package-lock.json && npm install --legacy-peer-deps
scripts.version:minor: node scripts/bump-versions.mjs minor && node scripts/sync-versions.mjs && shx rm -rf node_modules src/*/node_modules package-lock.json && npm install --legacy-peer-deps
scripts.version:major: node scripts/bump-versions.mjs major && node scripts/sync-versions.mjs && shx rm -rf node_modules src/*/node_modules package-lock.json && npm install --legacy-peer-deps
scripts.prepublishOnly: npm run clean:packages && npm run build:packages && npm run build:cli
scripts.publish:all: npm run prepublishOnly && node scripts/publish-workspaces.mjs && npm publish --access public --ignore-scripts
scripts.publish:dry: npm run prepublishOnly && node scripts/publish-workspaces.mjs --dry-run && npm publish --access public --dry-run --ignore-scripts
scripts.docker:build-push: npm run docker:build && npm run docker:push
scripts.release:patch: npm run version:patch && npm run publish:all && npm run release:commit
scripts.release:minor: npm run version:minor && npm run publish:all && npm run release:commit
scripts.release:major: npm run version:major && npm run publish:all && npm run release:commit
